title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
